turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Hello: Thanks for offering to help.  My friend Mark is suffering from bi-polar disorder, and despite being on medication, is spiraling out of control.

results.term: His mood swings are affecting his ability to stay ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: His mood swings are affecting his ability to stay employed and keep friends and family from wanting to interact with him.

results.term: I suspect he's not taking his medication as prescr...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I suspect he's not taking his medication as prescribed.  He's become a sociopath, which I understand is common with people suffering from this disorder.  He's unable to be empathic or sympathetic to anyone else's life.

results.term: Yes, it is affecting me.  In sum, I'm the only one...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes, it is affecting me.  In sum, I'm the only one left in his corner, but I feel like he's slipping away and becoming completely dysfunctional.  It's tough with privacy laws for me to even talk to his doctor to see what's going on.  I did send his doctor a long email, however, so hopefully he'll make whatever adjustments need to be made.

results.term: That's my suspicion, because things seem to be get...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: That's my suspicion, because things seem to be getting worse, quite honestly.

results.term: I have talked to him repeatedly.  Each time, he as...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have talked to him repeatedly.  Each time, he assures me that he understands my concerns and that he's going to get things together.  Literally, within a day or two, I hear from a mutual friend or family member that he's reverted back to doing things that are sociopathic.

results.term: I have.  He tells me that he's taking it regularly...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have.  He tells me that he's taking it regularly (or most of the time).  I challenged him on it and told him it can't be "most of the time."  That's why I sent his doctor a long email, explaining things to him, to see if he can't intervene and try to straighten him out.

results.term: You're right.  Mental illness, in all of its forms...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: You're right.  Mental illness, in all of its forms, is especially challenging.  Physical illness is more easy to understand, of course.

results.term: Thank you.  I think you understand the sadness and...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thank you.  I think you understand the sadness and anxiety in feeling powerless in this situation (or mostly powerless).  I have no real expertise in this area, but by contacting his doctor, maybe he can reevaluate whether the medicine and dosage needs to be changed.

results.term: Funny you ask.  He's a grown man - 35-years old.  ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Funny you ask.  He's a grown man - 35-years old.  I've never known him to have this issue, which seems so strange to me.

results.term: It started about 14 months ago - at least that's w...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: It started about 14 months ago - at least that's when people started alerting me to strange behavior.  I thought people who were bi-polar contracted the illness earlier in their life.

results.term: Around 10 months ago is when I first found out.  S...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Around 10 months ago is when I first found out.  Since then, I've received about 5 phone calls from people expressing concern.  I've visited him 3 times.

results.term: Thanks for being so engaged and sympathetic.  It d...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thanks for being so engaged and sympathetic.  It does make me feel better just to unload anonymously on here.  Thanks for carrying my burden and offering your support.

results.term: Before we end the conversation, I'd love hearing a...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Before we end the conversation, I'd love hearing a few of those suggestions, if you don't mind.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thank you.  You've been great.  Have a nice holiday and new year!

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Those are two things I've tried to keep in mind and you've reinforced my instincts.  Thanks again.
